steps.title: Sum all the data values
steps.content:
The mean equals the sum of all values divided by how many values there are. Let me add the seven data values:
$29 + 29 + 30 + 31 + 33 + 34 + 38 = 224$

steps.title: Divide by the number of values
steps.content:
Since there are 7 values, the mean is:
$$\frac{224}{7} = 32$$
C is correct.
